channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Turbocharging business processes
item.description: One of the few certainties in this world is that customers will always expect more from their service providers, and that whether they remain customers depends greatly on whether that expectation is met. And it isn’t just customers whose expectations are rising.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: TikTok is under investigation by the FTC over data practices and could face a lawsuit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Federal Trade Commission is investigating TikTok over its data and security practices, a probe that could lead to a settlement or a lawsuit against the company, according to a person familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Think you can ignore quantum computing? Think again.
item.description: “It’s been known since the 1990s that a large-scale quantum computer will be able to break many of the crypto systems we rely on for security,” says Dustin Moody, leader of Post Quantum Cryptography (PQC) at the National Institute for Standards and Technology (NIST) in Maryland.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What Erie Insurance does to develop transformational talent
item.description: When the leadership team at Erie Insurance planned a large-scale transformation, they knew it couldn’t be an IT-only effort.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: SEC tests insider-trading theory at trial of ex-Bay Area biotech executive
item.description: Securities traders and lawyers are closely watching the San Francisco case of Matthew Panuwat, the SEC’s first attempt to pursue so-called shadow trading.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple announces its annual developers conference is set for June 10
item.description: Although last year’s WWDC focused on the unveiling of the Vision Pro mixed reality headset, which launched in stores in February, this year is expected to turn to Apple’s AI efforts.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Dutch hyperloop center aims to advance futuristic transport technology
item.description: VEENDAM, Netherlands (AP) — A 420-meter (quarter-mile) white steel tube running alongside a railway line in the windswept northern Netherlands could usher in a new era in the transportation of people and freight.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CORDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 ways Apple’s monopoly lawsuit could change the iPhone experience for fans
item.description: The government's lawsuit provided a long list of how Apple has allegedly squashed competition with restrictive app store terms, high fees and its “walled-garden” approach, restricting how third-party companies interact with its brands and services.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: US and UK go after Chinese hackers accused of state-backed operation against politicians, dissidents
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Hackers linked to the Chinese government launched a sweeping, state-backed operation that targeted U.S. officials, journalists, corporations, pro-democracy activists and the U.K.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
